intro: Flora gives herself a one-week deadline to raise her stats high enough to ask her crush out on a date.
description:
After successfully leading her friends through a one-shot TTRPG campaign, part-time barista and full-time gamer Flora now faces a new challenge… How can she possibly muster up the courage to tell her DM that she likes him?!

In this sequel to the comedy/otome visual novel Fetch Quest, Flora gives herself a one-week deadline to raise her stats high enough to ask her crush out on a date. Is it silly and arbitrary? Yes! Will it work? Who knows!

Features:
- ~50k word story, and ~8k words of extras.
- Light stat-raising.
- A romance story with a trans man love interest.
- 4 different "Date" endings depending on Flora's stats.
- An otome game within an otome game.

Each day, choose one of four games for Flora to play with her friends and level up her stats. But be careful–Flora has been known to get a little too into her hobbies. If she doesn't strike the right balance, she might completely forget what her original goal was in the first place.

Acumen: If Flora chooses to play the 4X board game Techno-opolis, she'll increase her Acumen stat. This is a measure of her strategic thinking and problem-solving skills.

Charm: If Flora chooses to play the social deduction game Of Fiends and Fangs, She'll increase her Charm. This indicates her ability to control and manipulate others with the power of her words. 

Gud: In the action role-playing video game Clockwork Mercenaries, Flora will increase her Gud stat. This is not only a measure of her skill, but her grit and perseverance as well.

Moxie: If Flora plays the indie ghost hunting videogame Ghost Factory 2, her Moxie will increase. This determines how brave she is.
